rag_rules: Use AGREE logical operators and implication for contract expressions
Place component type contracts in component type scopes with valid feature references
Generate assumptions and guarantees using visible identifiers from the AADL model
generic_rules: Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence with pre() and step
Branching logic should use nested if-then-else expressions
Component type annexes should contain only visible ports and type-level guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use eq for helper declarations and const for named constants
Assumptions and guarantees must reference valid visible identifiers
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing tokens
Model fusion and insertion location decisions
